items.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 5 nominations total

items.title: The After
items.plot: Eight strangers are thrown together by mysterious forces and must help each other survive in a violent world that defies explanation.

items.title: The Barber of Little Rock
items.plot: The work of Arlo Washington, an African-American barber who founded a nonprofit community bank dedicated to providing economic opportunities for their community that mainstream banks will not offer.
items.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 3 nominations total

items.title: The Color Purple
items.plot: A tale spanning forty years in the life of Celie, an African-American woman living in the South who survives incredible abuse and bigotry.
items.awards: Nominated for 11 Oscars. 14 wins & 25 nominations total

items.title: The Eternal Memory
items.plot: Augusto and Paulina have been together for 25 years. Eight years ago, he was diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease. Both fear the day he no longer recognizes her.
items.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 14 wins & 27 nominations total

items.title: The Teachers' Lounge
items.plot: When one of her students is suspected of theft, teacher Carla Nowak decides to get to the bottom of the matter. Caught between her ideals and the school system, the consequences of her actions threaten to break her.
items.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 13 wins & 25 nominations total

items.title: To Kill a Tiger
items.plot: Ranjit, a farmer in India, takes on the fight of his life when he demands justice for his 13-year-old daughter, the victim of a brutal gang rape. His decision to support his daughter is virtually unheard of, and his journey unprec...
items.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 25 wins & 16 nominations total
